title: oncidium brevicorne
intro: Oncidium brevicorne is a species of orchid, specifically a type of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Oncidium brevicorne are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can be steeped in hot water to create a tea that is consumed for its medicinal benefits.
